title: Company Frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter in every <companies_dir>/<id>.md file
x-file-example:
---
id: anthropic
collection: company
name: "Anthropic"
url: https://anthropic.com
founded: 2021
people:
  - "[[dario_amodei]]"
  - "[[daniela_amodei]]"
tools:
  - "[[claude]]"
concepts:
  - "[[constitutional_ai]]"
  - "[[llms]]"
sources:
  - "[[anthropic_constitution_ai_2023]]"
tags:
  - ai
  - safety
verdict: recommended
---

## Description
AI safety company focused on building reliable large language models.

## Notes

id.description: Snake_case ID used as the filename and in [[wikilinks]]

collection.description: Node type — used by Obsidian-style apps to filter nodes by collection

name.description: Full legal or commonly-known company name

people.description: [[wikilink]] references to author nodes affiliated with this company

tools.description: [[wikilink]] references to tool nodes built or maintained by this company

concepts.description: [[wikilink]] references to curriculum concepts this company specialises in

sources.description: [[wikilink]] references to source nodes published by this company

verdict.description: User's overall recommendation — only set from explicit user opinion, never inferred
